allow: PowerShell($be=$null;$fe=$null; for\($i=0;$i -lt 30;$i++\){ if\(-not $be\){try{$be=\(Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:5122/api/hello" -TimeoutSec 2\).message}catch{}}; if\(-not $fe\){try{$null=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173" -TimeoutSec 2 -UseBasicParsing;$fe="up"}catch{}}; if\($be -and $fe\){break}; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700 }; "backend: $be"; "frontend: $fe")

PowerShell(foreach\($port in 5122,5173\){ Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Expand OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Remove-Item dev-test.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "cleaned up")
PowerShell($env:BACKEND_PORT='5300'; $env:FRONTEND_PORT='5400'; $env:MESSAGE='Hello from env'; pwsh -File .\\dev.ps1 2>&1 | Out-File dev-test.log)

PowerShell($be=$null;$fe=$null; for\($i=0;$i -lt 40;$i++\){ if\(-not $be\){try{$be=\(Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:5300/api/hello" -TimeoutSec 2\).message}catch{}}; if\(-not $fe\){try{$h=\(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5400" -TimeoutSec 2 -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $fe = if\($h -match 'VITE_API_URL|/src/main.jsx'\){'up'}else{'up'}}catch{}}; if\($be -and $fe\){break}; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700 }; "backend message \(port 5300\): $be"; "frontend \(port 5400\): $fe")

PowerShell(foreach\($port in 5300,5400\){ Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Expand OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Remove-Item dev-test.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "cleaned up")
